description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a dark hip roof and a combination of white and wood-textured exterior walls. The front features a paved driveway with two parked cars, a small fenced yard, and a covered entryway with steps leading to the main door. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light. The property is surrounded by a low wooden fence and includes a spacious backyard with a simple lawn. The house has clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a contemporary aesthetic, with a chimney visible on the roof. The overall design emphasizes functionality and modern urban living.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark hip roof, white and wood-textured walls, large windows, and a fenced yard with a driveway and cars.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, two cars, main entryway with steps, large windows, and fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood-textured wall, side windows, and the expanse of the backyard lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back door, additional windows, and the large open backyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, cars, and the side of the house with minimal windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, modern door, and minimal decorative elements
